scope.summary: Make mutation shards deterministic and resource-capped, grade OOM/task-cap events as errored, and refuse partial, stale, or population-incomplete seals.
out_of_scope: Producing the fresh exact-SHA five-surface mutation floor seal owned by D2.
Treating timeouts as confirmed test-failure kills.
Weakening the fail-closed SQL guard to improve a mutation score.

entry_points.name: bounded deterministic mutation shard
entry_points.trace: scripts/mutation_safety_gate.sh run-shard fixes cargo-mutants at -j1, caps a shard at 32 mutants, requires systemd MemoryMax/MemorySwapMax/TasksMax with OOMPolicy=continue, and records cgroup deltas in an integrity sidecar.

entry_points.name: fail-closed shard-to-seal migration
entry_points.trace: scripts/mutation_safety_gate.sh self-test passed complete-v2 acceptance and stale/hash mismatch rejection; python3 scripts/test_migrate_mutation_result.py passed its contract fixture.

entry_points.name: scheduled mutation workflow
entry_points.trace: .github/workflows/mutation-safety.yml rotates two deterministic <=32-mutant shards per scope per night with 90-day artifacts and exposes exact scope/shard recovery through workflow_dispatch.

entry_points.name: release mutation report gate
entry_points.trace: scripts/mutation_safety_gate.sh check-report returns E_STALE_SEAL on the deliberately stale legacy marker; it does not upgrade partial legacy percentages into a current green seal.

limitations: The committed mutation report is intentionally stale and the release mutation gate is red until D2 lands a fresh complete exact-SHA campaign; this close certifies D3's integrity mechanism, not a current mutation score.
This close does not claim a required-proof/v1 or mutation-result/v1 proof artifact and therefore remains not-ready on scoped mechanism tests.

known_defects.description: No fresh complete exact-SHA five-surface mutation floor seal is committed yet; check-report correctly returns E_STALE_SEAL.
